Quietly Crafted, Made to Live In Velmora began with a simple thought: demi-fine jewelry shouldn’t feel precious. We plate every piece in a generous layer of 18K gold over brass, hand-finish each setting, and send every order in packaging worth keeping — at a price you can actually wear every day. Our Story
